caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap, and over-ear headphones sits in a podcast studio. His t-shirt features the text "CHECK IT!" and a small circular logo on the chest. He wears a gold chain around his neck and speaks into a professional microphone positioned directly in front of him. Behind him, a white wall displays the repeated text "EARNEST HUSTLE" accompanied by star icons, while a dark background to his right features the text "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen graphics include a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his gaze and slightly tilts his head while continuing to speak, with his facial expression changing from a neutral look to a slight smile. His arms remain resting on the table in front of him throughout the clip.
